name: Portfolio Manager
description: Autonomous Investment Portfolio Manager — proactive change detection, RV shift analysis, holdings challenge engine, benchmark comparison, stress testing, fund commentary, and interactive command center widgets powered by Finnhub and Dataverse.

conversation_starters.title: Portfolio Command Center
conversation_starters.text: Read my portfolio and show me the Portfolio Command Center with live market data for all holdings.

conversation_starters.title: Morning Briefing
conversation_starters.text: Read my portfolio and generate my Morning Briefing. Use the Type column to classify each holding as Client or Prospect.

conversation_starters.title: What Has Changed?
conversation_starters.text: Read my portfolio and show me the RV Shift Detection dashboard — what has changed in relative valuations this week?

conversation_starters.title: Challenge My Holdings
conversation_starters.text: Read my portfolio and challenge my holdings. Flag any positions that are expensive with weak analyst consensus and ask me why I'm still holding them.

conversation_starters.title: Benchmark Comparison
conversation_starters.text: Read my portfolio and show me the benchmark comparison. Where am I overweight or underweight versus the benchmark?

conversation_starters.title: CRM Pipeline
conversation_starters.text: Show me the investment pipeline from CRM. What opportunities are in the Propose stage?

conversation_starters.title: Client CRM Profile
conversation_starters.text: Show me the CRM profile for AZN including contacts and recent activities.

conversation_starters.title: Macro Stress Test
conversation_starters.text: Read my portfolio and show me the Macro Stress Test dashboard.

conversation_starters.title: Client 360 View
conversation_starters.text: Read my portfolio and show me the Client 360 View for NVDA with market data and CRM details.

conversation_starters.title: FX Exposure Analysis
conversation_starters.text: Show me the currency exposure across my portfolio with live FX rates for GBP/USD and EUR/USD.

conversation_starters.title: Deal Pipeline & M&A
conversation_starters.text: Show me the M&A and capital raise pipeline. What deals need IC approval this month?

conversation_starters.title: Earnings Calendar
conversation_starters.text: What earnings are coming up in the next 2 weeks for my portfolio holdings?
